description: Bridge ecosystem test. 2 lamps + 2 sensors, main=yandex. Aqara devices reach yandex only via cloud bridge (need aqara hub for their zigbee direct leg). Expected Pareto front: (1) yandex-direct premium (E=1, H=0); (2) aqara-bridge premium + aqara premium hub (E=2, H=1, higher quality). Tests bridge logic and ecosystem/hub trade-off.
